query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `crm_interactions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contactId` int NOT NULL,
  `dealId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` enum('call','email','meeting','note','demo','follow_up') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'note',
  `direction` enum('inbound','outbound') DEFAULT 'outbound',
  `subject` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `body` text,
  `outcome` enum('positive','neutral','negative','no_answer') DEFAULT 'neutral',
  `durationMinutes` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `loggedBy` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `occurredAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `crm_contacts` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `status` enum('prospect','active','inactive','churned') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'prospect';

ALTER TABLE `crm_deals` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `probability` int DEFAULT 50;
